creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, 26 Apr 2000 ota@drexel.edu wrote:

> .if ${OSVERSION} < 400016 && !defined(WITHOUT_SSH1)
> It is said that "String comparison operator shuold be either == or !."
> and then some more message due to failure of this line.
> The same error occures on line 132 of ssh Makefile.

I think the ssh2 maintainer should just remove this section from the
makefile - we no longer support old versions of 4.0-CURRENT in ports. I
already made the corresponding change to the ssh port a few weeks ago.

Kris

----
In God we Trust -- all others must submit an X.509 certificate.
    -- Charles Forsythe <forsythe@alum.mit.edu>
